key_evidence: Forward trigger window OPEN — Magyar confirmed May 23 that political agreement with EC on €10.4B frozen funds is 'progressing well' with signing expected Thursday May 29 in Brussels

Agreement covers four reform areas: anti-corruption, EPPO membership, judicial independence, press freedom — would represent a 'reforms-formally-committed-with-EC-enforcement-mechanism' status upgrade
Signing NOT yet confirmed as of May 24 scan window — protocol requires fired-trigger confirmation before apply (per Vanuatu FORWARD-TRIGGER-RESOLUTION-CONFIRMED-FIRED v1.3 ruling)
Secondary negative: President Sulyok formally rejected May 18 resignation demand; Magyar threatens constitutional amendment via 141/199 supermajority by May 31
Net direction held pending signing outcome; sub-threshold positive accumulator implied if signing confirmed — would apply +2.0 fired-trigger uplift per established protocol
triage_note: Triage 2026-07-21: older duplicate; newest in group is 2026-05-25. Not applied; current published score is authoritative.
